title: More ways to keep moving
summary: Version 1.1 makes the daily loop faster, more personal, and easier to carry with you while keeping the app's price unchanged.
appStoreNotes: Coach openings now stream smoothly, matching the onboarding conversation.
Faster, more reliable coaching and plan creation.
Personalized reminders reflect your goals and unfinished daily actions.
Clearer Premium subscription status and plan details.

highlights.title: Coaching without the wait
highlights.description: Coach openings appear immediately and replies stream into the conversation, grounded in your active identity and progress.
highlights.availability: Ten check-ins each month are free; Premium adds unlimited coaching and memory across sessions.

highlights.title: A reminder that knows the next step
highlights.description: After you allow notifications, one daily reminder can name your goal or unfinished action, skip rest days, and stay quiet once you finish.
highlights.availability: Choose the time that fits your routine or turn reminders off at any time.

highlights.title: Cast votes beyond the app
highlights.description: Log progress from Home and Lock Screen widgets, Siri, or optional Apple Health matches for workouts, steps, and mindful minutes.
highlights.availability: Health matching is opt-in per action, and Health data stays on your device.

highlights.title: Progress that tells a story
highlights.description: Month in Votes recaps turn your history into a share-ready story. Premium Journey insights surface patterns and useful next steps.
highlights.availability: Your personal history is analyzed locally on your device.

highlights.title: Grace when life happens
highlights.description: Seven clean action-days earn a shield that can protect your streak from a miss. Every action can still have a 120-Second Kickstart for busy days.
highlights.availability: Free holds one earned shield; Premium can hold two.

highlights.title: Private and in your control
highlights.description: Opt in to a private iCloud backup, or celebrate progress with Someone in Your Corner through a share you initiate yourself.
highlights.availability: No Resolution Companion account is required.

media.title: See the adaptive AI Coach in action
media.description: A short demonstration of coaching that remembers the plan, reflects progress, and helps adjust the next step.
transcript: I gave an AI coach my goals for a month. I went in a skeptic.
It coaches; it does not lecture. A bad week adjusts the plan.
A coach in your corner follows up on what you said.
Resolution Companion. Any day can be day one. Free to start on the App Store.
